def find_common_users(active_users, banned_users):
    common = []
    for user in active_users:
        if user in banned_users:
            common.append(user)
    return common


def filter_allowed_items(items, allowed_ids):
    result = []
    for item in items:
        if item.id in allowed_ids:
            result.append(item)
    return result


def check_duplicates(entries, existing_entries):
    duplicates = []
    for entry in entries:
        if entry in existing_entries:
            duplicates.append(entry)
    return duplicates
